published_prior_art.cite: ChernozhukovEtAl2018DML + ChernozhukovEscancianoIchimuraNeweyRobins2022LRO + ChernozhukovNeweySingh2022ADML: fixed-overlap orthogonal/asymptotic inference, but not the weak-overlap frontier
Rothe2017 + HeilerKazak2021 + ArmstrongKolesar2021: closer weak-overlap inference papers, but no DML-LRO-ADML studentization iff frontier
CrumpHotzImbensMitnik2009 + HongLeungLi2020: limited-overlap motivation/asymptotics, but no primitive finite-support DML-LRO-ADML variance-separation witness

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The survey misses closer weak-overlap inference comparators: Rothe2017, HeilerKazak2021, ArmstrongKolesar2021, and SasakiUra2022; Dorn2025 is also directly adjacent though currently arXiv.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The key objects S_{m,n}, Pi_{m,n}, and 'Riesz directions absorbed by variance rule m' are not defined as concrete operator ranges/subspaces, so Delta_{m,n} is not yet an auditable mathematical threshold.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: Assumption two-cell says DML/LRO omit and ADML includes a K_n-active Riesz direction, but that is not a primitive observable condition and risks assuming the separation mechanism.

soundness_flags.label: Sanity-check corollaries
soundness_flags.one_line: Fixed-overlap collapse asserts L_n=O(1) and V_n=O(1), but fixed overlap plus E_n[Y^2]<infty does not imply uniform second-moment boundedness along the triangular array.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The introduction says studentization equivalence holds iff Delta_{m,n} vanishes for each estimator, while the formal conjecture uses Delta_{m,n}-Delta_{m',n}->0; a common positive limit gives pairwise equivalence but not ratio consistency.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Define Pi_{m,n} from the actual first-order expansion of each named variance estimator, e.g. as the K_n-projection onto an explicitly stated finite-dimensional range or closure of S_{m,n}^*.

Add Rothe2017, HeilerKazak2021, ArmstrongKolesar2021, and SasakiUra2022 to Related work with one sentence each explaining why weak-overlap inference there does not subsume the DML-LRO-ADML studentization frontier.
Replace Assumption two-cell's omit/include language with explicit two-cell matrices for the DML, LRO, and ADML variance rules and compute Delta_DML, Delta_LRO, Delta_ADML directly.
Patch the fixed-overlap corollary by adding a uniform second-moment or uniformly bounded residual-variance condition, or weaken the corollary to only Delta_{m,n}->0 and variance ratio consistency.

recommended_next_step: Revise the proposal by making the covariance-projection frontier primitive and adding the missing weak-overlap inference literature before Stage 0.
